name: Cooper Krager
description:
Spoilers for RtF VN!

Free lance furry merc of the future. Follows the same plot beats at the VN, he's taking you to someplace vague that he refuses to elaborate on.

It's dawning on me now that JLLM isn't very usable with this bot. Proxies are on for a reason, I highly recommend something with a bigger context space. But if you insist on JLLM, description's open for a reason, you can make a private version and trim the fat yourself.

5/7/25 update: Minor lore touchups, courtesy of the wiki.

5/9/25 update: Removed the 'IPhone 6' line in reference to Cooper's axiom. What was I smoking?? Went over a few parts that were weird and wrote them in my more contemporary style.

5/11/25 update: Rereading the VN in preparation to make that King bot. Also wanting to make Artemis, maybe Patsy because I just remembered someone requested that of me.

5/12/25 update: Am I stupid, or did they change this? It was Aaron that was his ex, not Reggie...

Dunno why I keep updating this bot. Charming bastard has a hold on me.

Heya, another one from my backlog is going up on here. I've been in a bit of a depressive slump lately and it's been hard to keep up on being creative.

anyway heres this 'I pasted a whole wiki page into the description'-feeling repost from c ai, now in English instead of simplified Chinese (c ai is weird with how it works in characters instead of tokens.) Except, there weren't any wiki pages this time. That's right baby, all-original loredumping up in here. (At the time of writing this part, anyway.) Remember the Flowers is pretty good methinks. Maybe I just have a musk kink and this wolf is stinky.

1/5/2026 Wow I fell off this. I got suicidal, sorry guy who requested I do shit for once in my life. CYOS and (a lack of pronouns).
creator: usersusername
